title: micromeria corsica
intro: Micromeria corsica, also known as Corsican mint or Corsican pennyroyal, is a small perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, antispasmodic, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Micromeria corsica include relieving digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and exhibiting antioxidant properties that help protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. The herb can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in cooking and as a natural insect repellent.
